Our Products

WHAT WE BUILD

From foundry floor to deep-water installation — engineered for reliability at every scale.

Core Product

Grey Iron Castings

High-strength GG-20 / GG-25 grade grey iron castings. Excellent vibration damping and machinability. Ideal for pump bodies, motor frames, and mechanical housings.

GG-20 / GG-25 Custom Dimensions OEM Ready
Enquire Now →
High Strength

Ductile Iron Castings

Superior tensile strength and impact resistance. GGG-40 to GGG-60 grade castings used in pump impellers, flanges, and structural components under heavy load.

GGG-40 / GGG-60 High Impact Pressure-Rated
Enquire Now →
Bestseller

Submersible Pumps

Deep-well, drainage, and sewage submersible pumps. Robust sealed motor construction with corrosion-resistant cast iron housings. Depths up to 300m.

0.5 – 15 HP Drainage / Deep-Well Borehole
Enquire Now →
Components

Pump Motor Housings

Precisely cast motor frames and end shields for submersible motor assemblies. Tight dimensional tolerances ensure perfect fit and thermal performance.

IP68 Rated Stainless Available Custom Flanges
Enquire Now →
Precision

Impellers & Volute Casings

Hydrodynamically optimised cast impellers and volute casings. Available in closed, semi-open, and open configurations for various flow requirements.

Closed / Semi-Open Bronze Optional Anti-Wear
Enquire Now →
Custom

Custom Engineered Parts

Have a drawing or a concept? We manufacture bespoke castings and pump components from your specs. Small batch to large volume production.

From Drawing Rapid Sampling NDA Available
Enquire Now →

Casting Types

HOW WE CAST

Each casting method produces specific components. Here's exactly what we make and how it's made.

Method 01

Sand Casting

The most versatile casting process — molten iron is poured into sand moulds for complex shapes and large components. Ideal for grey and ductile iron parts.

Products Made Using This Method
Pump Volute Casings Motor Housings End Shields Flanged Bodies Bearing Brackets
Method 02

Shell Mould Casting

Resin-coated sand shells create smooth-surface, dimensionally accurate components. Better surface finish than standard sand casting with tighter tolerances.

Products Made Using This Method
Pump Impellers Diffuser Rings Rotor Hubs Precision Brackets
Method 03

Investment (Lost Wax) Casting

Wax patterns are encased in ceramic and burned out before pouring — enabling intricate geometry and excellent surface finish for smaller, detailed components.

Products Made Using This Method
Closed Impellers Valve Bodies Connector Fittings Complex Inserts
Method 04

Gravity Die Casting

Molten metal flows under gravity into permanent metal moulds — giving consistent density and excellent mechanical properties. Best for high-volume repeating parts.

Products Made Using This Method
Pump Covers Motor End Caps Seal Housings Discharge Elbows
Quality Standards

CERTIFIED QUALITY

Our manufacturing processes conform to internationally recognised standards — giving procurement managers and engineers full confidence in every component.

✓ Every batch inspected before dispatch
✓ Dimensional reports available on request
✓ Material test certificates (MTC) included
✓ Traceability from melt to finished part
✓ Third-party inspection accommodated
🏅
Active

ISO 9001:2015

Quality Management System. Covers design, production, inspection, and delivery processes — ensuring consistent output every time.

🌿
Active

ISO 14001:2015

Environmental Management System. Responsible foundry operations — waste reduction, energy efficiency, and sustainable practices.

⚙️
Compliant

IS 210 / IS 1865

Bureau of Indian Standards specification for grey iron and ductile iron castings — the benchmark for domestic and export quality.

🇪🇺
Export

CE Mark Ready

Castings and pump components supplied to European clients meet CE conformity requirements for mechanical equipment directives.
